summary: Iteration 71 - Monthly Rollover System fully tested. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. All rollover endpoints working correctly with idempotency. Frontend month selector shows 12 future months and defaults to current month (April 2026).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly rollover system fully implemented and tested. APScheduler runs daily at 01:00. Rollover is idempotent - running twice creates 0 duplicates. 162 payments exist for April 2026 for Versoix club.

POST /api/rollover/run (with X-Club-Id).description: Generates payments for current month (April 2026), returns club_id, month, payments_created, recurring_transactions_created, late_payments_marked

POST /api/rollover/run/all.description: Triggers rollover for all 4 clubs, returns array of results

Idempotency - payments.description: Running rollover twice creates 0 duplicate payments (2nd run: payments_created=0)

Idempotency - transactions.description: Running rollover twice creates 0 duplicate recurring transactions

Late payments marking.description: Endpoint returns late_payments_marked count (marks pending payments with due_date < today as late)

KPI record creation.description: KPI record exists for 2026-04 after rollover

Payments for April 2026.description: 162 payments exist for April 2026 for Versoix club

APScheduler daily rollover.description: CronTrigger(hour=1, minute=0) configured in server.py for daily rollover at 01:00

Month selector - future months.description: Dropdown shows months from octobre 2024 to avril 2027 (12 months in future)

Month selector - default month.description: Default selected month is avril 2026 (current month)

Dashboard loads correctly.description: Dashboard displays KPIs, members, payments data for selected month

rollover_details.note: 0 recurring transactions because no active recurring_transactions in DB
